docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-07-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-07-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF SAMUEL WANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KAY'S CLEANERS IS PRESENT SUSAN LEE, OWNER ASSISTED BY NON-CERTIFIED INTERPRETER CURTIS CHAN. NON-CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY COURT CLERK R. SAHATJIAN. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT KAY'S CLEANERS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-07-2018 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF WANG, SAMUEL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WANG, SAMUEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAY'S CLEANERS $75.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $105.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF: $75 PLUS COSTS. I CREDIT PLAINTIFF 'S TESTIMONY THAT THE PANTS WERE NOT LOST IN TRANSIT. BUT DEFENDANT'S LIABILITY IS CAPPED UNDER CIV CODE 31840 AS A BAILEE TO THE AMOUNT DEFENDANT HAD REASON TO SUPPOSE THE PANTS TO BE WORN. MOREOVER, DAMAGES VALUE IS CAPPED AT THE MARKET VALUE RATHER THAN REPLACEMENT VALUE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $203.85 FILED BY WANG, SAMUEL AS TO DEFENDANT KAY'S CLEANERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-07-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED OCT-13-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KAY'S CLEANERS
